summary: Iteration 89 testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend Organization Map page verified with all 3 tabs (Org Chart, Approval Matrix, Statistics), CEO card, department sections, team expansion, and search functionality. Payroll attendance validation returns warning when no attendance data exists. Net Pay chart scatter-data endpoint returns correct base_salary from hr_employees.salary_structure.gross_salary.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) POST /api/hr/payroll/run returns 'warning' field when no attendance data exists for the selected month (e.g., future month 2030-12). Payroll still generates with zero deductions. 2) GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns correct fields: agent_name, role, base_salary (from hr_employees.salary_structure.gross_salary), and data array with month, label, commission, net_pay, base_salary per point. net_pay = base_salary + commission. 3) GET /api/organization/map returns: ceo (super_admin user), departments (array with name, head, teams, direct_members, count), approval_matrix (6 items: Leave Request, Commission Payout, Payroll, Lead Transfer, Expense Claim, Student Merge), stats (total_employees, total_departments, total_teams, role_distribution, department_distribution). 4) Frontend /organization page has 3 tabs: Org Chart (CEO card, department sections with heads and teams), Approval Matrix (6 workflow cards), Statistics (4 KPI cards, role distribution bars, department distribution grid). 5) Search functionality filters people across departments. 6) Organization Map link is in sidebar under Executive section.

payroll_attendance_validation.details: POST /api/hr/payroll/run returns 'warning' field when no attendance data exists. Warning message: 'No attendance records found for {month}. Payroll generated with full salary (zero deductions).' Payroll still generates successfully with employee_count > 0.

net_pay_chart_scatter_data.details: GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns base_salary from hr_employees.salary_structure.gross_salary. Each data point has month, label, commission, net_pay, base_salary. net_pay correctly equals base_salary + commission.

organization_map_api.details: GET /api/organization/map returns: ceo (id, name, role=super_admin, designation), departments (8 depts with heads, teams, direct_members), approval_matrix (6 workflow types), stats (58 employees, 8 departments, 11 teams, role_distribution, department_distribution)

organization_map_ui.details: Organization Map page at /organization shows: 3 tabs (Org Chart, Approval Matrix, Statistics), CEO card with crown icon, 7 department sections (Sales, Customer Service, Mentorship, Operations, etc.), team blocks with expand/collapse, search input that filters people across departments

organization_map_approval_matrix.details: Approval Matrix tab shows 6 workflow items: Leave Request (Employee -> TL/Dept Head -> HR -> CEO if >5 days), Commission Payout (System -> CEO -> Finance), Payroll (HR -> Finance -> CEO -> Bank), Lead Transfer (Sales Exec -> TL -> Admin), Expense Claim (Employee -> Dept Head -> Finance -> CEO if >5000 AED), Student Merge (CS Agent -> CS Head)

organization_map_statistics.details: Statistics tab shows: 4 KPI cards (58 Employees, 8 Departments, 11 Teams, 13 Roles), Role Distribution bars (Staff 18, Sales Executive 17, Mentor 5, Team Leader 5, etc.), Department Distribution grid (Sales 26, Marketing 10, Mentorship 6, Operations 6, Customer Service 6, Finance 2, Management 1, HR 1)

organization_map_sidebar.details: Organization Map link is visible in sidebar under Executive section, alongside Executive Dashboard

organization_map_search.details: Search input filters people across departments. Searching 'Mohammed' shows only matching people (Mohammed Sanjeed in Sales). Searching 'Sales' shows Sales department and related people.
